result.reason: This issue requests several enhancements to the connection tree search functionality, improving usability and search capabilities.
result.approach: 1. Implement 'Escape to clear search' functionality in ConnectionTreeWindow.cs by handling the KeyDown event for the search textbox. 2. Modify ConnectionTree.ApplyFilter in ConnectionTree.cs to optionally prevent automatic expansion of nodes after filtering, possibly controlled by a user setting. 3. Extend the search parsing logic within ConnectionTree.ApplyFilter to support multiple search criteria, which may involve changes to MrngSearchBox.cs for input handling.
